def positive_name_responsibility_mismatch():
    rule_id = "name_responsibility_mismatch"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Read-style, transformation-style, or utility-style names that still perform mutation or own multiple infrastructure concerns."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
